summary: Business Settings Hub & Dynamic Branding System testing complete. Backend: 9/10 tests passed (1 skipped - security issue). Frontend: All UI components working correctly. Public branding endpoint serves data without auth, admin settings hub persists changes correctly.

critical.issue: SECURITY: Endpoint does not require authentication - returns 200 without auth token. Should require admin auth.

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid='auth-brand-header' not found - LoginPageV2 uses BrandLogo directly instead of AuthBrandHeader component
ui_bugs.note: BrandLogo with data-testid='brand-logo' is present and working correctly

action_items: SECURITY FIX: Add admin authentication to /api/admin/settings-hub endpoint (GET and PUT) - currently accessible without auth
OPTIONAL: Update LoginPageV2 to use AuthBrandHeader component for consistency with data-testid='auth-brand-header'
critical_code_review_comments: public_branding_routes.py: Well-implemented with safe field projection - does NOT expose payment_accounts, API keys, or other sensitive data
admin_settings_hub_routes.py: MISSING authentication middleware - endpoint is under /api/admin/ prefix but doesn't enforce admin auth
BrandingContext.jsx: Properly fetches from /api/public/branding with fallback values
BrandLogo.jsx: Correctly reads from BrandingContext with data-testid='brand-logo'
Footer.js and PublicFooter.jsx: Both use useBranding() hook for dynamic legal_name/brand_name

success_rate.backend: 90% (9/10 tests passed, 1 skipped due to security issue)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Business Settings Hub and Dynamic Branding system is implemented. Public branding endpoint (/api/public/branding) works correctly without auth. Admin settings hub (/api/admin/settings-hub) needs authentication middleware added. Frontend BrandingProvider fetches branding on mount with fallback values. BrandLogo component has data-testid='brand-logo'. Footer uses dynamic legal_name from branding context.
